node.text:
🔮🏆 SLALOM CRYSTAL GLOBE SECURED

Another World Cup slalom victory in Špindlerův Mlýn for @mikaelashiffrin 🥇❄️, her 108th World Cup victory, sealing the slalom crystal globe in one decisive move.

At the venue where she made her first-ever World Cup start, she returns to add a ninth globe to her collection. After winning all but one slalom this season, she continues to set the benchmark in the sport’s most technical discipline, making control, precision and consistency look like home. Again. 🎿✨

#YouGotThis
#RoadToMilanoCortina2026

📸 @tchapaloute 2-10
Son of Chi forever 🌹

HISTORY for @hobbs_kessler 🤯

He smashes the 18-year-old 2000m indoor world record with an explosive 4:48.79 in Boston. 

#YouGotThis

node.text: this is the beginning.

For the 305 🙌 @canesfootball

#YouGotThis

Time to rewrite the history books ⚪️🔴 @indianafootball

#YouGotThis

Mikaela Shiffrin takes another night slalom win in Flachau after leading from the first run and controlling the race under the floodlights.

Chased hard by a deep field, she stayed clean when it mattered and closed out her sixth career victory on this slope.

Five wins already this season, and once again the night belonged to her.

#YouGotThis
#RoadToMilanoCortina2026
Designed by the best. For the best. 🛸 @romeodunze

node.text: Strip back the excess. Lift, jump, run. Dropset 4 is all you need.

@mikaelashiffrin delivers another masterclass in Semmering, closing out the year exactly where she belongs. On top.

Precision and composure once again set the standard as she continues to add to a perfect slalom record for the season so far.

#YouGotThis
#RoadToMilanoCortina

Nothing given. @spraguerrrr takes 🥇at the @worldfitnessproject 

#YouGotThis #adidasTraining

Under the lights in Courchevel, @mikaelashiffrin takes the World Cup night slalom win.

One of her most successful stages. A benchmark she keeps raising.

Her fourth straight slalom win, extending her record as the most successful World Cup skier of all time.

#YouGotThis
#RoadToMilanoCortina2026
📷 @tchapaloute

Germany Got Game.

Proud to sponsor the German National Basketball Team.
